summary: Comprehensive testing of Phase E features completed. All 25 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI testing verified all new Leave Applications tabs, Reimbursement file upload, Finance bulk actions, and INR currency format working correctly.

minor.issue: Response model doesn't include 'is_internal' field (stored in DB but not returned)

seed_data_creation: Created test admin user and session for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase E features fully tested: Leave Applications with 5 tabs (Applications, Calendar View, Leave Balances, Public Holidays, Accrual Policies), Reimbursements with file upload and project tagging, Finance with bulk add and profitability reimbursements column. Email notifications are in DEMO MODE - stored in database but not actually sent.

leave_applications.5_tabs_present: PASS - Applications, Calendar View, Leave Balances, Public Holidays (admin), Accrual Policies (admin)
leave_applications.calendar_view: PASS - Shows team leaves with color-coded legend (Public Holiday, Casual, Sick, Earned/Annual, Unpaid)
leave_applications.leave_balances: PASS - Shows message when no accrual policies configured
leave_applications.public_holidays_crud: PASS - Add Holiday button, admin-only tab
leave_applications.accrual_policies_crud: PASS - Admin can manage leave accrual per month
leave_applications.apply_for_leave: PASS - Dialog with leave type, dates, reason
leave_applications.approve_reject_buttons: PASS - Manager can approve/reject pending leaves

reimbursements.file_upload: PASS - JPG, PNG, PDF allowed, 5MB max, file validation works
reimbursements.project_vs_internal_toggle: PASS - Expense Type toggle between Internal and Project
reimbursements.project_selection: PASS - Dropdown to select project when Project expense type selected
reimbursements.inr_currency_format: PASS - Amounts displayed as INR X,XXX
reimbursements.receipt_url_storage: PASS - Receipt URL stored and accessible
reimbursements.upload_receipt_button: PASS - Button to upload receipt for existing reimbursements

finance.fee_structure_bulk_add: PASS - Bulk Add dialog with format: Stage | Deliverable | Percentage | Billing Date
finance.profitability_reimbursements_column: PASS - Shows Reimbursements column with project expenses
finance.cashflow_reimbursements_row: PASS - Shows Reimbursements - Team Expenses in expense rows
finance.inr_currency_throughout: PASS - All amounts use INR format

email_notifications.demo_mode: PASS - Notifications stored in email_notifications collection
email_notifications.subject_format: PASS - Subject includes type and INR amount
email_notifications.body_content: PASS - Body includes details and approver name

mocked_apis.email_notifications: DEMO MODE - Stored in database (email_notifications collection) but not actually sent
